name: Salesman's Sauerkraut Chocolate Cake
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces sauerkraut (ensure no caraway seeds are present)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the sauerkraut by using an 8-ounce can and lightly draining it. Chop by hand, avoiding a food processor.
2. In a large bowl, combine margarine and sugar; beat in eggs one at a time. Add vanilla and blend thoroughly.
3. In another bowl, sift together dry ingredients. Gradually add to the egg mixture, alternating with water. Stir in sauerkraut until smooth.
4. Grease a 13 x 9 x 2-inch pan. Pour batter into pan and bake at 350 degrees for 30-35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean. For easier frosting and transport, leave cake in pan.
5. Melt chocolate chips and margarine over double boiler. Remove from heat and stir sour cream, vanilla, and salt. Gradually beat in powdered sugar until frosting reaches spreading consistency. Adjust with more powder if needed.
6. Frost cake while slightly warm or after cooling completely.
